title: Years
questions: What images spring to mind when you hear the word 'year'?
What has been the best year in your life?
What important events happened in the year of your birth?
Has this year been a good year for you?
Do you make New Year resolutions?
In what year in history would you like to go back to?
What was the best thing to happen to you last year?
What is the best year at school?
Do you think a year is a long time?
Which time of the year do you like best?
What can you get done in a year?
What things do you do every year?
Can you remember what you did each year on your birthday?
How do you feel when a new year arrives?
What do you think life will be like in the year 2100 and the year 3000?
If you could take a year out from studying or work, what would you do?
How long is 'donkey's years'?
What does it mean to put years on someone or take years off someone?
Does getting on in years mean getting older or doing well in life?
Would a book titled "A year in the life of [ your name ]" be a good book?
